title: dianthus brutius subsp. brutius
intro: Dianthus brutius subsp. brutius, also known as the 'Maiden's Blush', is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, characterized by its pink to white flowers and slender stems. The medicinal properties of Dianthus brutius subsp. brutius include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Dianthus brutius subsp. brutius is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the plant's flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent.
